nasb.text: But he said to him, “You yourself know how I have served you and how your cattle have fared with me.

esv.text: Jacob said to him, “You yourself know how I have served you, and how your livestock has fared with me.

cnv.text: 雅各對拉班說：“我怎樣服事了你，你的牲畜在我手裡情形怎樣，你是知道的。

ccb.text: 雅各回答说：“你知道我怎样努力地服侍你，照顾你的牲畜。

csbs.text: 雅各就对他说：“我怎样服事你，你的牲畜在我这里怎样，你都知道。
